name: arduview-hero-16x9
_note: 16:9 LP/desktop hero. LANDSCAPE-native clips only (no crop loss). HDR clips tone-mapped to SDR by the brick. Silent, no captions. In/out in seconds.

segments.beat: OPEN — clean desk orbital of the lit device; transparent shell + lit display, calm beauty hook
TRANSPARENCY — slow rotation, PCB/gold traces visible through the clear resin, display lit
DISPLAY — see-through display lit (checkerboard), transparent top face, board visible behind
GAMES + IN HAND — held in one hand, legible arcade game UI (sprite/hearts/coin), pocket scale
PLAY — thumbs on D-pad/A-B, active display, gameplay posture (you actually play it)
CLOSE — clean wood-bg orbital, PCB through shell, settles it as a collectible object
